name: get_supplier
description: Retrieve supplier details including name, contact information, rating, and status. DO NOT GUESS supplier_id. If the ID is unknown, you MUST provide supplier_name instead.

supplier_id.description: The unique identifier of the supplier to retrieve.

supplier_name.description: The exact name of the supplier to search for if the ID is unknown. DO NOT guess the ID.

name: get_supplier_kb
description: Search supplier knowledge base documents for relevant information using semantic retrieval.

query.description: The search query to find relevant supplier documents and policies.
